Fat Albert (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $48,114,556Details
International Box Office $449,000
Worldwide Box Office $48,563,556
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,021,510 (20.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,674 opening theaters/3,622 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $91,354,212

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2004 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: April 22nd, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: March 22nd, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for momentary language.
Running Time: 97 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Live Action Remake, Fiction / Reality Crossover
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Davis Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
